calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Prince William County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Prince William County Public Schools is Monday, August 18, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Prince William County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Prince William County Public Schools runs Mar 30, 2026–Apr 6, 2026, 8 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Prince William County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Prince William County Public Schools runs Dec 22, 2025–Jan 2, 2026, 12 days. School resumes Jan 5, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: 8-Day Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break is 8 days — longer than Fairfax County (5 days) and most neighboring Virginia districts this year.

yearNumbers.label: Eid al-Adha
yearNumbers.detail: School closed for Eid al-Adha — one of the few Virginia districts to formally observe this holiday.

calendarNotes: Prince William County Public Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 18, 2025. Spring Break runs March 30–April 6, 2026. PWCS observes religious and cultural holidays — including Eid al-Fitr and Diwali when they fall on school days — with dates that shift annually with the lunar calendar. The school year ends June 12, 2026.
